name: opendeploy
description: One-click OpenDeploy autoplan for coding agents through the official versioned npm CLI. The opendeploy skill is the canonical deploy entrypoint; /deploy is an alias. Common prompts include deploy this, host this, ship this, launch this, make it live, preview this, put this online, get a live URL, deploy this monorepo, deploy web plus worker, attach a persistent volume, persist data, mount persistent disk, persist uploads, persist SQLite, persist file-based queues, and engage OpenDeploy support. First deploy can use an explicitly-approved local deploy credential, then returns the live URL and account-binding link after the deployment is active. Per-service persistent volumes are supported (single-attach RWO, node-local) — declared inline on services create for new services (no downtime) or routed via opendeploy-volume for existing services. Alarm investigation can use opendeploy-oncall to post concise updates into the user's private OpenDeploy oncall Discord thread; non-alarm platform support requests can use opendeploy-oncall to return the user's private Discord channel URL.

security.reporting: Report suspected credential exposure, unsafe skill behavior, or platform abuse to security@opendeploy.dev.

cli.version_policy: Default runner is the global opendeploy command. Before any deploy mutation, run npm list -g @opendeploydev/cli --depth=0 --json and npm view @opendeploydev/cli version --json, then preflight/update check. If a plugin update is available, ask that first and recommend Update plugin now before the next step. Use the current host's update command: Claude runs claude plugin marketplace update opendeploy && claude plugin update opendeploy@opendeploy; Codex runs codex plugin marketplace add opendeploy-dev/opendeploy-codex-plugin --ref main. If the user skips plugin update, continue with the loaded plugin and record the skip. Then handle CLI staleness: ask with structured AskUserQuestion whether to update global with npm install -g @opendeploydev/cli@latest or skip update and continue. If the user skips CLI update, continue with the installed global CLI when it supports the needed commands; if it does not, stop before mutation. Do not update npm itself or unrelated global packages. Do not use npx @opendeploydev/cli as a fallback or mix npx and global inside one workflow. First-deploy mutation requires @opendeploydev/cli 0.1.19 or newer for single-target environment normalization, bound credential status, service create read-back, progress-aware deploy watching, smart source archives, deployment-auditor plan output, Git metadata bind-mount audits, dependency placeholder-secret checks, dependency credential fields, and post-deploy context save; alarm lifecycle commands require 0.1.8 or newer.

conditional.name: zip
conditional.when: uploading a local directory through the CLI

destination_purposes.https://registry.npmjs.org: CLI package metadata and version probe
destination_purposes.https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opende: CLI-owned skill-plugin version check — unauthenticated GET, never carries the OpenDeploy bearer token
destination_purposes.https://dashboard.opendeploy.dev/api: OpenDeploy gateway for all platform mutations and reads

sensitive_inputs: real .env values may be submitted to the OpenDeploy API as service env configuration after explicit key-only consent
GIT_TOKEN is sent only to the OpenDeploy gateway for private repository access
OpenDeploy tokens and local deploy credentials are stored locally with mode 0600

token_kinds.authority: guest tenant while unbound; account-level deploy authority after binding

auth_file.binding_url_persistence: Not stored. Derive at use-time from gateway + guest_id + bind_sig and print only after an active deploy URL exists.

guest_tier.enforcement: Backend rejects POST /v1/projects/:id/services with 403 guest_quota_exceeded when CPU, memory, or replicas exceed the free-plan ceiling.
guest_tier.upgrade_recommendation: When a quota/plan gate blocks the intended deploy, ask with Upgrade plan (Recommended) first. If chosen, return upgrade_url exactly and stop mutation until the user comes back.

account_binding_url.purpose: User-facing handoff after a successful deployment. The skill never binds on the user's behalf.
account_binding_url.skill_must: Print the URL only after the deployment is active and APP_URL is known. Never print bind_sig standalone.

metadata.tagline: One-click deploy autoplan through the versioned OpenDeploy CLI.
